description:
Add avatar upload functionality to the Settings page.

## Requirements

### Backend
- Set up a Supabase Storage bucket called `avatars` (if not already existing)
- Create an API endpoint or extend existing profiles API to handle avatar upload:
  - Accept file upload (multipart/form-data)
  - Validate file type (image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp)
  - Validate file size (max 2MB)
  - Upload to Supabase Storage under `avatars/{userId}/{timestamp}`
  - Update `profiles.avatar_url` in the database
  - Return the public URL

### Frontend (`src/app/settings/page.tsx` or new `src/components/settings/avatar-upload.tsx`)
- Show current avatar with an edit overlay/button
- File picker (click to select) 
- Drag-and-drop zone (nice to have)
- Preview selected image before saving
- Simple square crop (256×256) using CSS or canvas
- Upload progress indicator
- Error states for wrong file type, too large, upload failure
- On success: update displayed avatar immediately

### Tests
- File picker opens correct file types
- Preview renders before upload
- Upload succeeds and URL updates
- Error states display correctly
- Avatar persists across page reload

log.action: Task moved to triage — filesystem validation failed
